nasb.text: “All the commandments that I am commanding you today you shall be careful to do, that you may live and multiply, and go in and possess the land which the Lord swore to give to your forefathers.

esv.text: “The whole commandment that I command you today you shall be careful to do, that you may live and multiply, and go in and possess the land that the Lord swore to give to your fathers.

cnv.text: “我今日吩咐你的一切誡命，你們要謹守遵行，使你們可以存活，人數增加，並且可以進去得著耶和華向你們的列祖起誓應許的那地。

ccb.text: “你们要谨遵我今日吩咐你们的一切诫命，以便能够存活，生养众多，并且得到耶和华起誓要赐给你们祖先的土地。
